data.name: EmailConfirmation_Body
data.value: Thank you for registering on Learnix. Click the button below to confirm your email and activate your account.

data.name: EmailConfirmation_FallbackText
data.value: If the button doesn't work, copy the link:

data.name: EmailConfirmation_HelpText
data.value: If you did not request this registration, please ignore this email.

data.name: PasswordReset_Body
data.value: We received a request to reset the password for your Learnix account. Click the button below to set a new password. The link is valid for 1 hour.

data.name: PasswordReset_FallbackText
data.value: If the button doesn't work, copy the link:

data.name: PasswordReset_IgnoreNotice
data.value: If you didn't request this — ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.

data.name: InstructorApproved_Body
data.value: Your application for the Instructor role on the Learnix platform has been approved.

data.name: InstructorApproved_BodyCta
data.value: You can now create and publish courses. Log in to your account to get started.

data.name: InstructorRejected_Body
data.value: Unfortunately, your application for the Instructor role on the Learnix platform has been rejected.

data.name: InstructorRejected_BodyRetry
data.value: You may submit a new application after addressing the indicated issues.

data.name: UserBanned_Body
data.value: Your Learnix account has been suspended by an administrator.

data.name: UserBanned_Support
data.value: If you believe this was a mistake, please contact support.

data.name: UserUnbanned_Body
data.value: Your Learnix account has been reinstated. You now have full access to all platform features.

data.name: UserUnbanned_Warning
data.value: Please follow community guidelines to avoid future suspensions.

data.name: UserRoleChanged_BodyAssigned
data.value: You have been granted the {0} role on Learnix. Log in to your account to access new features.

data.name: UserRoleChanged_BodyRevoked
data.value: The {0} role has been removed from your Learnix account.

data.name: AccountDeleted_Body
data.value: Your Learnix account has been deleted. You can no longer sign in, and your profile is no longer visible on the platform.

data.name: AccountDeleted_Recovery
data.value: Nothing is erased yet. Your courses, progress and certificates are kept until {0}, and the account can still be restored up to that date. After it, your personal data is erased for good.

data.name: AccountDeleted_Support
data.value: If this was a mistake, or you want your account back, reply to this email before that date and an administrator will restore it.

data.name: AccountRecovered_Body
data.value: Your Learnix account has been restored by an administrator. Your courses, progress and certificates are exactly where you left them.

data.name: AccountRecovered_SignIn
data.value: You can sign in again with your usual email and password.

data.name: CourseAdminUnpublished_Body
data.value: A Learnix administrator has unpublished your course:

data.name: CourseAdminUnpublished_BodyDraft
data.value: The course has been moved to draft status. Please make the necessary changes and resubmit for publication.

data.name: CourseAdminDeleted_Body
data.value: A Learnix administrator has deleted your course:

data.name: CourseAdminDeleted_Support
data.value: If you have questions about this decision, please contact support.
